title: erodium gaussenianum
intro: Erodium gaussenianum, also known as Gaussen's Stork's-bill, is a plant species in the geranium family (Geraniaceae) native to China. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestion. Erodium gaussenianum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being.
